gpsAccuracy.title: gpsAccuracy
gpsAccuracy.description: The GPS accuracy reading of the device.

signalStrength.description: The cellular signal strength of the device.

batteryVoltage.title: batteryVoltage
batteryVoltage.description: The battery voltage reading of the device.

lastPing.title: lastPing
lastPing.description: The timestamp of the last telemetry ping from the device.

pingRate.description: The frequency at which the device sends telemetry pings.

deviceESN.title: deviceESN
deviceESN.description: The Electronic Serial Number of the device.

telemetryStatus.title: telemetryStatus
telemetryStatus.description: The overall telemetry status summary (e.g., Healthy, Degraded, Offline).

allMetrics.title: allMetrics
allMetrics.description: A consolidated summary of all telemetry metrics.

success.title: success
success.description: Indicates whether telemetry data was retrieved successfully.

message.title: message
message.description: A status or error message about the telemetry check.
